title: Vantung ah min hong sap lai tak

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa Jesuh hong pai kik ciang,
hong sap laitak kei mah zong om ding hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Vantung ah, min hong sap laitak
Vantung ah, min hong sap laitak
Min hong sap laitak kei mah zong om ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zing tung mei kai omlo khuavak
Jesuh min tawh si tho a
nungta kik a nuam sung tum ni.
Sihna a ngah mihing te in
Vantung inn ah tum ciang in
sap lai tak kei mah zong om ding hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa a na hong seem sak a
Kidopna tawh a ma itna gensak ni
Leitung sihna hun hong kheng ding
Kei mah zong om ding hi’ng
